category_sources: source_facts.description says Aquarium animation in ASCII art; official Robobunny page presents ASCIIQuarium as a terminal aquarium animation.
display_name_sources: Official Robobunny project page title is ASCIIQuarium; source_facts.name is asciiquarium.
docs_sources: Official Robobunny HTML project page is the best official documentation surface and links downloads/source files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Robobunny pages provide source tarballs and a source directory but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Robobunny page describe ASCII art animation in the terminal; source_facts.source-archive and official directory provide Perl program source.
